title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: They carry out safety checks on all aircraft.

questions.firstSentence: He continued playing the guitar despite the noise.
questions.secondSentence: He (1) _________ the guitar despite the noise.

questions.firstSentence: The mountain road was so dangerous that they closed it.
questions.secondSentence: It was (1) _________ that they closed it.

questions.firstSentence: I was able to book the last ticket online.
Nobody had informed me about the delay.
Despite the heavy rain, they went for a walk.
questions.secondSentence: They went for a walk (1) _________ it was raining heavily.

questions.firstSentence: My grandfather was in the habit of fishing on Sundays.
